assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions checking Istio/K8s compatibility matrix and includes specific commands to verify compatibility before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes command 'istioctl version --remote' and mentions 'Verify Istio/K8s compatibility matrix' in the pre-upgrade assessment section

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Never upgrade GKE and Istio simultaneously' and shows Phase 1 as upgrading Istio first before GKE upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook failures as a common gotcha and provides mitigation by temporarily disabling sidecar injection during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring proxy versions, it doesn't specifically explain that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected or emphasize verifying sidecar version matching

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes proxy status monitoring with 'istioctl proxy-status' command and mentions checking for proxy sync status throughout the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple relevant commands including 'istioctl version --remote', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check Istio components

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring for traffic interruption and provides general warnings about mesh upgrades, it doesn't specifically warn about traffic disruption due to control plane and sidecar version mismatches
